title: oncoba pauciflora
intro: Oncoba pauciflora, also known as the African star fruit or star cherry, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oncoba pauciflora include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve skin health, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations may also include extracts or tinctures for topical application.
